title: Phonological Awareness Training — The Foundation of Reading Success
summary:
One-day Phonological Awareness Training for Pre-School and Elementary Teachers, School Leaders and Parents. Led by Anita S. Whyte, EdS. — Literacy Coach, Educator, Trainer and Reading, Phonics & Writing Specialist.

Strong sounds. Strong start. Strong readers. Phonological awareness is the #1 predictor of reading success.

Register at thewhyteacademy.com or call +233 545 223 324.

title: Couples Retreat 2026 Ghana — A Time to Reconnect, Refresh and Rediscover at Aqua Safari Resort
summary: A 3-night couples retreat at Aqua Safari Resort, Ghana — 27th to 30th August 2026. Includes luxury accommodation, daily meals, guided retreat sessions and couple bonding activities. GHC 9,999 per couple.
